RenewPeerConn.peerConnId: The peer connection ID to renew
RenewPeerConn.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
RenewPeerConn.billing.paymentTiming: Payment timing: Prepaid or Postpaid. Required when creating an order; not required for renewal orders
RenewPeerConn.billing.reservation: Reservation details. Not required for Postpaid; required for Prepaid
